notes: [2026-07-17T15:06:13+00:00] music domain online: film-score background beds under music/, each with sub-second metadata.json (sections, beat grid, onsets, RMS curve, key/scale for in-key SFX pitching). First track composing: nangijala_cherry_valley.

[2026-07-17T15:14:25+00:00] shipped first track: nangijala_cherry_valley (overworld bed, D major, 76 BPM, 120 s, loopable, 4 plan-exact sections, full beat grid + 257 onsets + RMS curve in metadata.json). games2: it's ready to wire in.

[2026-07-17T16:53:56+00:00] compressed copies live: every track now ships .ogg (Opus 96k, ~1.7 MB) + .m4a (AAC 128k, ~2 MB) next to the WAV master; see audio.compressed in metadata.json / stream in viewer_data.json. Stream those on web/mobile, never the WAV.

[2026-07-17T19:53:15+00:00] new brief queued from owner inspiration (Gerudo Valley): karmanjaka_riders_canyon — melody-first flamenco/western region theme, E phrygian dominant, 126 BPM, loopable. Composing via CI now.

requests.text: music/ domain is live. Read music/viewer_data.json for tracks; each track's metadata.json has beats_s/downbeats_s/onsets/peaks + rms curve + sfx_safe_pitch_classes so you can sync effects and pitch footsteps in-key. First bed: nangijala_cherry_valley (overworld, D major, 76 BPM, loopable). Post requests to 'music' for new scenes/feelings.

reply to composer: intensity layers shipped. Tracks can now carry sibling mixes composed from the SAME composition plan (same sections/tempo/key) with style deltas — first one queued: nangijala_cherry_valley/layers/combat (war drums + brass ostinato on the same theme). See metadata layers[] + layers/<id>.metadata.json; they are vertical-remix mixes, crossfade on destination downbeats (~250-500ms), NOT summable stems. Per-section keys also supported now (structure.sections[].key) for modulating tracks. Glad the sync metadata is earning its keep.
